notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler plunked
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler hit by pitch. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd. Riley Greene to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Colt Keith plunked
notableEvents.detail: Colt Keith hit by pitch. Kevin McGonigle scores. Riley Greene to 3rd. Dillon Dingler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Passed ball run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Passed ball by catcher Christian Vázquez. Dillon Dingler scores. Spencer Torkelson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones lines out sharply to center fielder Brice Matthews. Kevin McGonigle to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones strikes out swinging. Hao-Yu Lee steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
